Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from app import app
from models.models import Activity, ActivityParticipant
with app.app_context\(\):
    acts = Activity.query.all\(\)
    print\(f'Attivita totali: {len\(acts\)}'\)
    for a in acts:
        n_parts = len\(a.participants\)
        matched = sum\(1 for p in a.participants if p.rooming_list_id\)
        print\(f'  - {a.name} \({a.date}\) -> {n_parts} partecipanti, {matched} con rooming_list_id'\)
")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from app import create_app
app = create_app\(\)
with app.app_context\(\):
    from models.models import RoomingList
    from sqlalchemy import func
    batches = RoomingList.query.with_entities\(RoomingList.import_batch, func.count\(\)\).group_by\(RoomingList.import_batch\).all\(\)
    for b, c in batches:
        print\(f'{c} partecipanti - {b[:30]}'\)
" 2>&1)
